title: cerris microphyla
intro: Cerris microphyla, also known as Chinese or Oriental hazelnut, is a plant species in the family Betulaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cerris microphyla include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Traditionally, Cerris microphyla is prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
